seoTitle: Cottage Point vs Cougal — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cottage Point and Cougal. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cottage Point vs Cougal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cottage Point and Cougal.
heading: Cottage Point vs Cougal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cottage Point, New South Wales and Cougal, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cougal has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Cottage Point (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cottage Point or Cougal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cottage Point has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Cougal scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cottage Point scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Cougal scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cottage Point or Cougal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cougal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
